scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @home-design-ops/shared && npm run dev:web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @home-design-ops/shared && npm run build --workspace @home-design-ops/api && npm run build --workspace @home-design-ops/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @home-design-ops/shared && npm run lint --workspace @home-design-ops/api && npm run lint --workspace @home-design-ops/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @home-design-ops/shared && npm run test --workspace @home-design-ops/api && npm run test --workspace @home-design-ops/web
